Careers

SEARCH OPEN POSITIONS

With You, We All Achieve More

You aren’t looking for “ordinary.” Neither are we. At SMX®, we encourage our people to push the boundaries of “what if?” every day. In fact, we expect it.

Whatever your role, you’ll have the opportunity to take ownership of complex and exciting projects—from transforming business processes for tomorrow’s hybrid workforce to ensuring the success of “can’t fail” national security missions.

Collaboration and teamwork are part of our culture, as is respect for diverse points of view and experiences. Ready to take your career further? So are we. Join us.

2026 Energage Top Workplaces Winner

For the fourth year in a row, SMX has been recognized by Energage as an employer of choice and one of the nation’s Top Workplaces.
LEARN MORE

Accounts Payable Analyst (5219)

SMX has an exciting opportunity for a talented Accounts Payable Analyst in a high growth environment. This position is hybrid with one day per week onsite required in our Hollywood, MD office. The Accounts Payable Analyst will be reporting directly to Accounts Payable Supervisor and will be responsible for the accurate processing of invoices utilizing Deltek Costpoint. Essential Duties & Responsibilities Perform accounts payable focused activities to include 3-way matching, coding, review, routing, and scanning, obtain approvals, as well as data entry into Costpoint Ensure invoice transactions follow governmental, regulatory, and legislative requirements and company policies Collaborate with functional analysts and related contract personnel to ensure proper accounts and project designation Research and resolve vendor inquiries to include but not limited to, invoice amount and/or quantity discrepancies, payment terms, and invoice status Maintain accurate, complete, and organized...

All Source Analyst Data Effects Cell (DEC)/Tactical Mission Networks (TMN) – Eastern Europe

We are seeking an experienced All Source Analyst to support the Data Effects Cell (DEC) in delivering timely, accurate, and operationally relevant analytical products to U.S. Army Special Operations Command (USASOC) and partner force units operating within the Tactical Mission Network (TMN) environment. The All Source Analyst is the analytical engine of the cell — responsible for collecting, fusing, and exploiting data from multiple intelligence disciplines and open sources to produce finished products that directly inform Special Operations planning, targeting, and decision-making.This position requires a seasoned analyst who is comfortable working across GEOINT, SIGINT, HUMINT, OSINT, and tactical data streams, synthesizing disparate information into coherent, actionable assessments. The ideal candidate has a strong intelligence analysis background — ideally within or in direct support of the SOF community — and brings the analytical processes, attention to detail, and operational...

Category 1 Linguist (Mandarin)

We are seeking highly skilled, and professional interpreters for Mandarin to English and English to Mandarin translation to join our candidate pool in Taiwan, collaborating closely with international clients. Ideal candidates will possess strong language interpretation skills and cultural competency. We welcome individuals who have spent considerable time overseas or hold a degree in English, Linguistics, or a related field. We are looking for mid-career professionals with experience in interpreting as part of an organization, as well as experience in freelance interpreting and translating. We embrace the ethos that a good interpreter commands the room, conveys the message—not just the words—and utilizes circumlocution to address gaps in technical lexicon. This position is located onsite in Taipei, Taiwan. The machine-readable files are formatted to allow researchers, regulators, and application developers to more easily access and analyze data.

Damon Erickson

Sr. Solutions Architect-Lead

After more than 8 years with SMX, the biggest thing that kept me engaged is, if you come up with an idea, there’s always someone willing to listen. I’ve never had anyone shoot an idea down. I sometimes forget that not everyone at other companies has that. You don’t get siloed here. We give people opportunity and they have the ability to take the initiative and run with it.

We have a startup-type mentality, but with a bigger company supporting us. The way that people approach things, the way that we look at our customers, and the way that people are able to just reach out and talk to each other — it’s super important for me. And that’s honestly the types of things that’s kept me here for so long.

 

Meagan Beavers

LOE Lead/Senior Financial Analyst

Attracted by SMX’s mission, collaborative culture, and focus on client impact, I quickly recognized it as a place where people genuinely enjoy working together and supporting one another. The opportunity to grow within the Financial Analyst role and work toward increasingly senior responsibilities aligned strongly with my long-term career goals, making the decision to join an easy one. Since joining SMX in October 2017 as a Junior Financial Analyst, I’ve progressed into Mid Financial Analyst and later into an LOE Lead / Senior Financial Analyst role, while also completing both my associate and bachelor’s degrees along the way.

My onboarding experience during the first 30–90 days set me up for a successful ramp. I focused on learning the tools and processes, building strong relationships across the team, and completing training and shadowing opportunities that helped me quickly take ownership of my work.

The culture at SMX is supportive, growth-oriented, and family-like. From day one, I felt welcomed and encouraged to ask questions, learn new skills, and continue growing professionally while collaborating with teammates across the organization. For anyone considering a career at SMX, my advice is to embrace the learning culture, ask questions early, and take ownership of your work. SMX provides strong support for employees who are willing to grow and continue building their careers.

Bryan Tkacs

Senior Consultant

Joining cBEYONData + SMX felt like a natural decision after working alongside the team for nearly two years on the Army EBS-C contract. I had already seen firsthand the professionalism, collaboration, and commitment the team brought to the mission, and I was grateful for the opportunity to continue supporting that work as part of the organization.

My onboarding experience was seamless. I received my equipment within days of signing and was quickly back in step with my team and Product Owner, which made the transition smooth and allowed me to stay focused on delivering for the mission.

The culture at SMX is professional, collaborative, and mission-focused. People take their work seriously, but they’re also approachable and willing to help when needed. There’s a strong emphasis on open and honest communication, which helps teams focus on solving problems and moving work forward effectively. Since joining SMX, working in a fast-paced Agile environment has strengthened my ability to think creatively, adapt quickly, and communicate tradeoffs clearly as priorities evolve. It’s helped me grow not only in problem-solving, but also in how I collaborate with teams to deliver the best possible solutions.

For anyone considering a career at SMX, I’d say it’s a great place to grow if you value teamwork, direct communication, and solving meaningful challenges that make an impact.

Ricky Martin

Director of Procurement/Logistics & Trade Compliance

I was looking to get with a company that is up-and-coming and had an opening for a compliance program. SMX did not have one, so I looked at that as an opportunity to come in and start up a robust compliance program from the ground up. And that’s exactly what I did.

SMX has that small company feel, but we obviously work as a large company. Our CEO stresses a team of teams approach; we are multiple teams working to accomplish the same common goal. When you have a team of teams approach, it makes everything more streamlined, without having all of the potential headwinds that some companies have internally.

Fred Severson

Senior Program Manager

I first heard about SMX from a former coworker who spoke very highly of the company, and I kept it on my radar for years. After going through the interview process and meeting the team, it became clear this was a place where I could thrive while also being myself- making the decision to join an easy one.

My onboarding experience was exceptional. I had the opportunity to learn hands-on by working closely with my manager, and any questions or needs I had were addressed quickly, which made the transition seamless.

The culture at SMX is forward-leaning, fast-paced, and customer-focused. It’s a place where people work hard but also genuinely enjoy what they do. Since joining, I’ve grown into my current role as a Senior Program Manager/Chief of Staff on the LEIA contract—exactly where I want to be, doing meaningful work and enjoying it along the way.

For anyone considering SMX, it’s a place full of opportunity for those willing to put in the work. With a strong focus on internal growth and supportive leadership, there are many paths to advance and build your career.

Jonathan Nepini

Graphics Specialist

I first encountered SMX while working in the print industry and was immediately impressed by the professionalism and quality of the creative team. When the opportunity to join came up, it felt like the right fit-especially during an exciting time following the company’s rebrand. The people, variety of work, and growth opportunities made saying yes easy.

My onboarding experience was a great balance of structured learning and hands-on training with my team. It never felt overwhelming, and by the end of my first 90 days, I felt confident and ready to contribute.

What stands out most about SMX is the culture—driven, collaborative, and supportive. Even under tight deadlines, everyone works together to get the job done. Over the past four years, I’ve grown significantly, taking on a larger role in trade shows and events, now coordinating logistics for more than two dozen conferences annually. I also support marketing efforts across a range of initiatives, which keeps the work dynamic and engaging.

For anyone considering SMX, my advice is to focus on where your skills can make the biggest impact. There are many opportunities to contribute and grow, making it a great place to build your career.

Privacy Overview

This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website. These cookies will be stored in your browser only with your consent. You also have the option to opt-out of these cookies. But opting out of some of these cookies may affect your browsing experience.
Necessary
Always Enabled
Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information.
Non-necessary
Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website.
